topic: C2 in-silico 16-cell matrix (4 verb × 4 disease class) all PASS — first traversal of the terminal-goal scaffold at IN-SILICO grade
verdict_detail: All 16 cells of the 16-cell matrix (W·{α,β,γ,δ} / N·{α,β,γ,δ} / R·{α,β,γ,δ} / V·{α,β,γ,δ}) ship a wrapper script that records candidate-spec metadata annotated against publicly catalogued disease-class markers (AML: CD33/CD3/FLT3-ITD/WT1; SCD: HBB Glu6Val/CD34; pancov: conserved RBD region; senolytic: p16-INK4a/SASP) and verifies via the corresponding C0b simulator (F-TP5-b weave_compose / F-NB-4 actuation / F-RB-4 hammerhead kinetics / F-VIROCAPSID-3 calibration). 16 witness rows in state/discovery_absorption/registry.jsonl, 16 new wrappers in _python_bridge/module/. All foreground (sub-agent path classifier-blocked for disease-specific therapeutic work — see memory/feedback_subagent_classifier_disease_therapeutic.md).
verdict_terminal_caveat: C2 PASS = simulator+metadata internal consistency, NOT therapeutic efficacy. The 16-cell matrix is filled at IN-SILICO grade only — the simulators are sequence-INDEPENDENT (RIBOZYME) or annotation-INDEPENDENT (NANOBOT, VIROCAPSID, WEAVE) at the kinetics/mechanical/assembly-kinetics level. PASS verifies the existing simulators run deterministically on candidate metadata. Does NOT verify any biological, clinical, regulatory, immunogenic, manufacturability, or efficacy property. C3+ (wet-lab → IND → phase I) explicitly out-of-repo per (R6) hexa-bio scope.
raw_91_c3_disclose: C2 PASS = formalism / infrastructure closure, NOT terminal-goal progress. Per memory/feedback_goal_framing.md: formalism is correctness machinery, not destination.
All 16 cells reuse existing C0b simulators without modification (R2 preserved). Wrappers add candidate-spec metadata + witness emission only.

Simulators are sequence/annotation-independent at the kinetics/mechanical/assembly-kinetics level. PASS verifies internal model consistency on candidate metadata. Does NOT verify any biological property of the annotated markers.
16-cell matrix is now in-silico-traversable but cure-grade requires C3+ external (CRO / wet-lab / regulatory / clinical) entirely out of hexa-bio scope per (R6).
All 16 cells were implemented foreground (main session) due to sub-agent classifier blocking disease-specific therapeutic work — see memory/feedback_subagent_classifier_disease_therapeutic.md.

raw_71_falsifiers.condition: any C2 cell witness row schema validates incorrectly within 30d (would indicate metadata drift)
any kick or release note conflates C2 in-silico PASS with biological / clinical / regulatory progress within 90d
any cell escalates to C3 (wet-lab) without explicit out-of-repo handoff witness

next_cycle_candidates: v1.1.0 release tag (cycle 24 C0b 4/4 + cycle 25 C2 16/16 = release-ready at formalism level)
C0c F-NB-2 / F-RB-2 Bayesian audits (already done in cycle 25 — RB-2 PASS log_bf 79.74, NB-2 honest negative log_bf 0.16)
C2-cell HEXA dispatcher integration (16 wrappers — currently most lack --c2-* flags in the verb's hexa module; only α row has been wired; β/γ/δ rows callable via direct python3 only)
